short_desc_en: A short-horizon reversal baseline used as a practical benchmark for mean reversion.
short_desc_zh: 一个短周期反转基线，用于作为均值回复方向的实用对照。

description.motivation_en: This baseline checks whether a standard short-horizon reversal rule can explain part of the same cross-sectional behavior captured by the custom factors.
description.motivation_zh: 这个基线用于检验一个标准的短周期反转规则，是否能解释自定义因子所捕捉到的部分横截面行为。
description.construction_en: It ranks stocks by recent short-horizon return with the usual reversal interpretation.
description.construction_zh: 它按近期短周期收益排序，并采用常规的反转解释。
description.interpretation_en: Compared with the two representative SF factors, this baseline is weaker but still directionally sensible, making it a useful benchmark rather than just a placeholder.
description.interpretation_zh: 相较两个代表性 SF 因子，这个基线更弱，但方向上仍然合理，因此它是一个真正有意义的 benchmark，而不是占位项。

analysis_note_en: This page is mainly here as a clean benchmark. It helps answer whether the SF results are simply another face of short-term reversal or whether they capture something a little different.
analysis_note_zh: 这个页面最重要的作用是做一个干净的对照。它能帮助判断：SF 结果到底只是短期反转的另一种写法，还是确实抓到了稍微不同的东西。
